allow:
Bash(# Find all TypeScript files excluding tests and mocks
find src -name ""*.ts"" -o -name ""*.tsx"" | grep -v -E ""(test|spec|__tests__|__mocks__|setupTests)"" > /tmp/source_files.txt

# Find imports in test files
find src -name ""*.test.ts"" -o -name ""*.test.tsx"" > /tmp/test_files.txt

echo ""Checking for files only imported by tests..."")

Bash(# Check what imports FloorAligner
rg -l ""import.*FloorAligner|from.*FloorAligner"" src/ | grep -v __tests__)

Bash(# Check what imports Resizer
rg -l ""import.*Resizer|from.*Resizer"" src/ | grep -v __tests__)

Bash(# Check for jest.fn() usage outside of test files to find potential test utilities
rg ""jest\.(fn|mock|spyOn)"" src/ -l | grep -v -E ""(test|spec|__tests__|__mocks__|setupTests)"")

Bash(# List all files in __mocks__ directory
ls -la src/__mocks__/)
